{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Video Editor & Content Publisher",
  "description": "Fast Fix Consult, a Recruitment Company, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Video Editor &amp; Content Publisher

Job Locations:&nbsp;Lagos &amp;&nbsp;Ogun (Remote)
Employment Type:&nbsp;Part-Time (Structured Role)

Job Summary


	We are looking for a disciplined and detail-oriented mobile video editor to support our content team by editing and publishing short-form videos across our social media platforms.
	This is a structured remote role suited for individuals who are serious about building experience in digital media and content management.


&nbsp;Key Responsibilities


	Edit 5 short-form videos per week (simple, clean edits)
	Add captions, light transitions, and background audio where necessary
	Post edited videos and other provided materials across our social media platforms
	Ensure content is uploaded correctly and on schedule.


Role Scope:


	All raw content will be provided
	No content creation required
	No social media strategy required
	No engagement or DM management required
	Posting and formatting of provided content only
	This role focuses strictly on editing and content publishing execution.
	Ideal Candidate.


We are looking for someone who


	Is confident using CapCut or similar mobile editing tools
	Pays attention to detail
	Meets deadlines consistently
	Communicates clearly and professionally
	Is interested in long-term growth in digital media.


Growth Opportunity


	Structured remote experience
	Opportunity for performance-based salary review
	Potential for expanded responsibilities as the brand grows.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send&nbsp;a brief introduction about theirselve,&nbsp;1&ndash;2 editing samples (if available) and their CV to:&nbsp;fastfixconsult@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Only serious applicants will be considered.&nbsp;",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-18",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-08",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Fast Fix Consult"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Ogun",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "196105"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Video Editor & Content Publisher Job at Fast Fix Consult




        
    

        
        Fast Fix Consult, a Recruitment Company, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Video Editor & Content Publisher

Job Locations: Lagos & Ogun (Remote)
Employment Type: Part-Time (Structured Role)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a disciplined and detail-oriented mobile video editor to support our content team by editing and publishing short-form videos across our social media platforms.
	This is a structured remote role suited for individuals who are serious about building experience in digital media and content management.


 Key Responsibilities


	Edit 5 short-form videos per week (simple, clean edits)
	Add captions, light transitions, and background audio where necessary
	Post edited videos and other provided materials across our social media platforms
	Ensure content is uploaded correctly and on schedule.


Role Scope:


	All raw content will be provided
	No content creation required
	No social media strategy required
	No engagement or DM management required
	Posting and formatting of provided content only
	This role focuses strictly on editing and content publishing execution.
	Ideal Candidate.


We are looking for someone who


	Is confident using CapCut or similar mobile editing tools
	Pays attention to detail
	Meets deadlines consistently
	Communicates clearly and professionally
	Is interested in long-term growth in digital media.


Growth Opportunity


	Structured remote experience
	Opportunity for performance-based salary review
	Potential for expanded responsibilities as the brand grows.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send a brief introduction about theirselve, 1–2 editing samples (if available) and their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only serious applicants will be considered.     

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Registered Paediatric Nurse",
  "description": "Lily hospitals Limited, established since 1986 remains one of the foremost hospitals in Nigeria and within the South-South region of the country. It is the first private hospital in Nigeria to achieve ISO 9001:2000 quality management system certification from the Standards Organization of Nigeria (SON) and was also recently accredited with COHSASA (Council for Health Service Accreditation of Southern Africa) Certificate.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Registered Paediatric Nurse

Job Location:&nbsp;Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are seeking a qualified and compassionate Registered Paediatric Nurse to join our clinical team.
	The successful candidate will provide high-quality nursing care to infants, children, and adolescents while supporting paediatricians and ensuring excellent patient outcomes.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide professional nursing care to paediatric patients in line with established clinical standards.
	Monitor and assess patients&rsquo; conditions and promptly report any changes to the attending physician.
	Administer medications, treatments, and immunizations as prescribed.
	Assist paediatricians during examinations, procedures, and emergencies.
	Educate parents and caregivers on treatment plans and child health practices.
	Maintain accurate patient records and nursing documentation.
	Ensure a safe and hygienic environment for patients.
	Comply with hospital policies and infection prevention protocols.


Requirements


	Registered Nurse (RN) qualification is required.
	Minimum of 1 year of relevant experience in paediatric nursing.
	Registered Paediatric Nurse (RPN) certificate is mandatory.
	Valid practicing license with the Nursing and Midwifery Council of Nigeria (NMCN).
	Strong clinical, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a multidisciplinary healthcare team.
	Must reside in Warri, Delta State.


Why Join Us?


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for professional growth and career advancement.
	A supportive and dynamic work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and other relevant credentials to:&nbsp;recruitment@lilyhospitals.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Registered Paediatric Nurse Job at Lily hospitals Limited




        
    

        
        Lily hospitals Limited, established since 1986 remains one of the foremost hospitals in Nigeria and within the South-South region of the country. It is the first private hospital in Nigeria to achieve ISO 9001:2000 quality management system certification from the Standards Organization of Nigeria (SON) and was also recently accredited with COHSASA (Council for Health Service Accreditation of Southern Africa) Certificate.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Registered Paediatric Nurse

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a qualified and compassionate Registered Paediatric Nurse to join our clinical team.
	The successful candidate will provide high-quality nursing care to infants, children, and adolescents while supporting paediatricians and ensuring excellent patient outcomes.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide professional nursing care to paediatric patients in line with established clinical standards.
	Monitor and assess patients’ conditions and promptly report any changes to the attending physician.
	Administer medications, treatments, and immunizations as prescribed.
	Assist paediatricians during examinations, procedures, and emergencies.
	Educate parents and caregivers on treatment plans and child health practices.
	Maintain accurate patient records and nursing documentation.
	Ensure a safe and hygienic environment for patients.
	Comply with hospital policies and infection prevention protocols.


Requirements


	Registered Nurse (RN) qualification is required.
	Minimum of 1 year of relevant experience in paediatric nursing.
	Registered Paediatric Nurse (RPN) certificate is mandatory.
	Valid practicing license with the Nursing and Midwifery Council of Nigeria (NMCN).
	Strong clinical, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a multidisciplinary healthcare team.
	Must reside in Warri, Delta State.


Why Join Us?


	Competitive salary and benefits package.
	Opportunities for professional growth and career advancement.
	A supportive and dynamic work environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and other relevant credentials to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Uncle Stans Foods is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small chops. Operating primarily pick up and delivery services, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing and coordinating the operations of multiple outlets, ensuring efficiency, profitability, and compliance with company standards.
	The ideal candidate must have proven experience in managing multiple locations within a QSR environment and be able to drive performance across all outlets.


Key Responsibilities
Multi-Outlet Management:


	Oversee daily operations across multiple outlets
	Ensure consistency in service delivery, product quality, and operational standards
	Conduct regular outlet visits and performance reviews


Performance &amp; Profitability:


	Drive sales growth and achieve operational targets
	Monitor revenue, expenses, and overall outlet performance
	Implement strategies to improve efficiency and profitability


Team Leadership:


	Supervise Restaurant Managers and outlet teams
	Ensure proper staffing, training, and performance management
	Enforce discipline and maintain high team morale


Operational Control:


	Ensure compliance with company policies, SOPs, and quality standards
	Monitor inventory management and reduce wastage across outlets


Customer Experience:


	Ensure excellent customer service across all outlets
	Address and resolve escalated customer issues


Reporting &amp; Strategy:


	Prepare and present operational reports to management
	Provide insights and recommendations for business improvement


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc / HND in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years of experience as an Operations Manager in a QSR
	Proven experience managing multiple outlets simultaneously
	Strong leadership and people management skills
	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities
	Ability to work in a fast-paced and high-pressure environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrunclestansfoods@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Operations Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

        Uncle Stans Foods is a quick service restaurant (QSR),a fast-food model built for speed and convenience, featuring a limited, standardized menu of items like small chops. Operating primarily pick up and delivery services, it focuses on rapid food assembly from pre-prepared components, ensuring consistent, affordable meals delivered in minutes. Our functional, casual environment prioritizes efficient turnover over prolonged dining, making it a dominant global industry by fulfilling the demand for reliable, on-the-go satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing and coordinating the operations of multiple outlets, ensuring efficiency, profitability, and compliance with company standards.
	The ideal candidate must have proven experience in managing multiple locations within a QSR environment and be able to drive performance across all outlets.


Key Responsibilities
Multi-Outlet Management:


	Oversee daily operations across multiple outlets
	Ensure consistency in service delivery, product quality, and operational standards
	Conduct regular outlet visits and performance reviews


Performance & Profitability:


	Drive sales growth and achieve operational targets
	Monitor revenue, expenses, and overall outlet performance
	Implement strategies to improve efficiency and profitability


Team Leadership:


	Supervise Restaurant Managers and outlet teams
	Ensure proper staffing, training, and performance management
	Enforce discipline and maintain high team morale


Operational Control:


	Ensure compliance with company policies, SOPs, and quality standards
	Monitor inventory management and reduce wastage across outlets


Customer Experience:


	Ensure excellent customer service across all outlets
	Address and resolve escalated customer issues


Reporting & Strategy:


	Prepare and present operational reports to management
	Provide insights and recommendations for business improvement


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc / HND in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years of experience as an Operations Manager in a QSR

	Strong leadership and people management skills
	Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female Content Creator (NYSC)",
  "description": "House Unlimited is a leading real estate and consultancy firm providing innovative architectural, engineering, and property development solutions. We are committed to delivering high-quality services and fostering growth in our team members.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Content Creator (NYSC)

Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse Zone 4,&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type:&nbsp;Internship | On-site
Work Days: 4 days/week

About the Role


	House Unlimited Nigeria is looking for a creative and motivated Content Creator (NYSC Intern) to join our Media and Marketing team.
	If you love storytelling, understand social media trends, and enjoy creating engaging short-form videos for TikTok and other platforms, this is the perfect opportunity.
	This role is ideal for NYSC members seeking hands-on experience in digital content creation within a fast-growing creative and tech company.


Responsibilities


	Produce engaging short-form videos optimized for social media.
	Edit high-quality videos using CapCut and other editing tools.
	Monitor trends, viral sounds, and social media styles to generate fresh content ideas.
	Collaborate in planning and developing creative content aligned with brand strategy.
	Support digital marketing campaigns with compelling visual and video content.
	Participate in studio shoots, behind-the-scenes recordings, and client project productions.
	Manage social media pages for the company and CEO.


Requirements


	Passion for TikTok and digital content creation.
	Basic video editing skills (CapCut or similar tools).
	Creativity, confidence, and willingness to appear on camera.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.
	NYSC members seeking PPA placement are strongly encouraged to apply.


Benefits


	Monthly allowance: N50,000
	Practical training in content development and video editing.
	Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing creative and tech company.
	Access to studio equipment and professional mentorship.
	Supportive and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their R&eacute;sum&eacute;,&nbsp;PPA Letter,&nbsp;Links to their TikTok handle or past content and a short introduction about themselves to:&nbsp;recruitment@houseunlimitednigeria.com&nbsp;using the &quot;NYSC Intern &ndash; Content Creator Application&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-16",

  },

Female Content Creator (NYSC) Job at House Unlimited




        
    

        
        House Unlimited is a leading real estate and consultancy firm providing innovative architectural, engineering, and property development solutions. We are committed to delivering high-quality services and fostering growth in our team members.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Content Creator (NYSC)

Job Location: Wuse Zone 4, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Internship | On-site
Work Days: 4 days/week

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	House Unlimited Nigeria is looking for a creative and motivated Content Creator (NYSC Intern) to join our Media and Marketing team.
	If you love storytelling, understand social media trends, and enjoy creating engaging short-form videos for TikTok and other platforms, this is the perfect opportunity.
	This role is ideal for NYSC members seeking hands-on experience in digital content creation within a fast-growing creative and tech company.


Responsibilities


	Produce engaging short-form videos optimized for social media.
	Edit high-quality videos using CapCut and other editing tools.
	Monitor trends, viral sounds, and social media styles to generate fresh content ideas.
	Collaborate in planning and developing creative content aligned with brand strategy.
	Support digital marketing campaigns with compelling visual and video content.
	Participate in studio shoots, behind-the-scenes recordings, and client project productions.
	Manage social media pages for the company and CEO.


Requirements


	Passion for TikTok and digital content creation.
	Basic video editing skills (CapCut or similar tools).
	Creativity, confidence, and willingness to appear on camera.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.
	NYSC members seeking PPA placement are strongly encouraged to apply.


Benefits


	Monthly allowance: N50,000
	Practical training in content development and video editing.
	Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing creative and tech company.
	Access to studio equipment and professional mentorship.
	Supportive and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Résumé, PPA Letter, Links to their TikTok handle or past content and a short introduction about themselves to: [email protected] using the "NYSC Intern – Content Creator Application" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Warehouse Manager",
  "description": "Learn Africa Plc is a leading learning resource business with a history spanning over 60 years. The company was established in 1961 as Longman Nigeria - a book publishing firm wholly owned by Longman Group UK Limited, now Pearson Education. On July 23, 1996, the shares of Longman Nigeria Plc were listed on the Nigerian Stock Exchange. In 2008, the company became a subsidiary of Pearson Plc following the latter&#39;s increase in its shareholding from 29 to 51 percent. In 2011, however, Pearson and Longman Nigeria mutually agreed to become separate corporate entities in Nigeria.

The main business of Learn Africa Plc is the publication and marketing of textbooks for the entire gamut of the educational system - nursery, primary, secondary and tertiary. Today, the company has the widest range of books/educational resources and a very expansive distribution network in Nigeria.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:&nbsp;

Job Position:&nbsp;Assistant Warehouse Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers&nbsp;

Requirements


	Qualification: HND / BSc Degree in Accounting / Bus. Admin, Purchasing &amp; Supply Mangement
	Experience: Minimum of 2 years of experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;hr@learnafricaplc.com&nbsp;using the Job Position&nbsp; as the subject of the mail.
And
Click here to apply online",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-18",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-02",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "LEARN AFRICA PLC"

Assistant Warehouse Manager Job at Learn Africa Plc




        
    

        
        Learn Africa Plc is a leading learning resource business with a history spanning over 60 years. The company was established in 1961 as Longman Nigeria - a book publishing firm wholly owned by Longman Group UK Limited, now Pearson Education. On July 23, 1996, the shares of Longman Nigeria Plc were listed on the Nigerian Stock Exchange. In 2008, the company became a subsidiary of Pearson Plc following the latter's increase in its shareholding from 29 to 51 percent. In 2011, however, Pearson and Longman Nigeria mutually agreed to become separate corporate entities in Nigeria.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



The main business of Learn Africa Plc is the publication and marketing of textbooks for the entire gamut of the educational system - nursery, primary, secondary and tertiary. Today, the company has the widest range of books/educational resources and a very expansive distribution network in Nigeria.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Assistant Warehouse Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers 

Requirements


	Qualification: HND / BSc Degree in Accounting / Bus. Admin, Purchasing & Supply Mangement
	Experience: Minimum of 2 years of experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position  as the subject of the mail.
